    Index

    A B C D E F G I L M N O P R S T U V W Y 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    addAgent() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Adds an agent to the in-transit count.
    addAgent(Agent) - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Adds an agent to the simulation.
    addEdge(Edge) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Adds an edge to the graph.
    addNode(Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Adds a node to the graph.
    addRandomAgents(int, int, int, double, double) - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Adds a specified number of random agents with randomized properties within the given ranges.
    addRandomEdges(List, int) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Connects new nodes randomly to the existing graph.
    addRandomNodes(int, double, double) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Adds a specified number of random nodes with unique IDs and positions.
    Agent - Class in evacuation.agent
    Represents an agent moving through the evacuation graph toward an exit.
    Agent(String, Node, Node, Graph) - Constructor for class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Constructs an Agent with default settings (speed=1, tolerance=1.0, YIELD, CALM, FIXED).
    Agent(String, Node, Node, Graph, int, double, Agent.Behavior, Agent.PsychologicalState, Agent.DestinationMode) - Constructor for class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Constructs an Agent with all parameters.
    Agent.ArrivalBehavior - Enum Class in evacuation.agent
    What the agent does when it arrives at its destination.
    Agent.Behavior - Enum Class in evacuation.agent
    The movement behavior of an agent when navigating.
    Agent.DestinationMode - Enum Class in evacuation.agent
    The destination selection mode.
    Agent.MovementState - Enum Class in evacuation.agent
    The movement state of an agent.
    Agent.PsychologicalState - Enum Class in evacuation.agent
    The psychological state of an agent.
    AJOUT_AGENT - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer.Mode
     
    AJOUT_ARETE - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer.Mode
     
    AJOUT_DANGER - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer.Mode
     
    AJOUT_NOEUD - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer.Mode
     
    AJOUT_SORTIE - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer.Mode
     
    ajouterAgent() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.addAgent()
    ajouterAgent(Agent) - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.addAgent(Agent)
    ajouterEdge(Edge) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Deprecated.
    Use Graph.addEdge(Edge)
    ajouterNode(Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Deprecated.
    Use Graph.addNode(Node)
    animateMovement(double) - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Updates the visual display position of this agent for smooth animation.
    animerDeplacement(double) - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.animateMovement(double)
    areteExiste(Node, Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Deprecated.
    Use Graph.edgeExists(Node, Node)
    ARRIVED - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.MovementState
    Agent has reached its destination.
    AUCUN - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.graph.Edge.TypeBlocage
    Deprecated.
     

    B

    block() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Blocks this edge with the default FIRE blockage type.
    block() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
    Blocks this node, preventing agents from entering.
    blockByFire() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Blocks this edge due to fire.
    blockByFlood() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Blocks this edge due to flooding.
    BLOCKED - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.MovementState
    Agent is blocked with no path available.
    bloquer() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.block()
    bloquer() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
    Deprecated.
    Use Node.block()
    bloquerParFeu() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.blockByFire()
    bloquerParInondation() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.blockByFlood()

    C

    calculerChemin(Node, Node) - Method in interface evacuation.routing.PathFinder
    Deprecated.
    Use PathFinder.findPath(Node, Node)
    CALM - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.PsychologicalState
    Calm — moves at normal speed, yields to others.
    charger(File) - Static method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.load(File)
    close() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Exit
    Closes this exit, preventing agents from using it.

    D

    DANGEROUS_PERSON - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.graph.DangerZone.DangerType
    A dangerous person — slows nearby agents.
    DangerZone - Class in evacuation.graph
    Represents a danger zone node in the evacuation graph.
    DangerZone(String, double, double, DangerZone.DangerType, int) - Constructor for class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
    Constructs a DangerZone at the specified position.
    DangerZone(String, double, double, String, int) - Constructor for class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
    Constructs a DangerZone parsing the danger type from a string.
    DangerZone(String, DangerZone.DangerType, int) - Constructor for class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
    Constructs a DangerZone at the origin.
    DangerZone.DangerType - Enum Class in evacuation.graph
    The type of danger represented by this zone.
    DangerZone.TypeDanger - Enum Class in evacuation.graph
    Deprecated.
    Use DangerZone.DangerType
    debloquer() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.unblock()
    debloquer() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
    Deprecated.
    Use Node.unblock()
    DELETE - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.ArrivalBehavior
    Agent is marked for deletion upon arrival.
    deplacer() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.move()
    DijkstraPathFinder - Class in evacuation.routing
    Pathfinder implementation using Dijkstra's algorithm.
    DijkstraPathFinder(Graph) - Constructor for class evacuation.routing.DijkstraPathFinder
    Constructs a DijkstraPathFinder for the given graph.
    distributeAgentsToExits() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Redistributes all non-arrived agents across available exits using load balancing.

    E

    Edge - Class in evacuation.graph
    Represents an edge (connection) between two nodes in the evacuation graph.
    Edge(Node, Node, double) - Constructor for class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Constructs a bidirectional edge between two nodes with the given weight.
    Edge.BlockType - Enum Class in evacuation.graph
    The type of blockage affecting this edge.
    Edge.TypeBlocage - Enum Class in evacuation.graph
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.BlockType
    edgeExists(Node, Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Checks whether an edge exists between two nodes.
    estTerminee() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.isFinished()
    evacuation - package evacuation
     
    evacuation.agent - package evacuation.agent
     
    evacuation.graph - package evacuation.graph
     
    evacuation.routing - package evacuation.routing
     
    evacuation.simulation - package evacuation.simulation
     
    evacuation.ui - package evacuation.ui
     
    Exit - Class in evacuation.graph
    Represents an evacuation exit node in the graph.
    Exit(String, double, double, int) - Constructor for class evacuation.graph.Exit
    Constructs an Exit at the specified position.
    Exit(String, int) - Constructor for class evacuation.graph.Exit
    Constructs an Exit at the origin with the given capacity.

    F

    fermer() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Exit
    Deprecated.
    Use Exit.close()
    FEU - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.graph.DangerZone.TypeDanger
    Deprecated.
     
    FEU - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.graph.Edge.TypeBlocage
    Deprecated.
     
    findAvailableExit(Node) - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Finds the nearest available exit from a given node using Euclidean distance.
    findPath(Node, Node) - Method in class evacuation.routing.DijkstraPathFinder
    Computes the shortest path from source to destination.
    findPath(Node, Node) - Method in interface evacuation.routing.PathFinder
    Computes the shortest path from source to destination.
    FIRE - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.graph.DangerZone.DangerType
    Fire — propagates to neighboring nodes over time.
    FIRE - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.graph.Edge.BlockType
    Blocked by fire.
    FIXED - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.DestinationMode
    Agent moves toward a fixed destination.
    FLEE_DENSITY - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.DestinationMode
    Agent moves toward the least crowded neighbor.
    FLEE_DESTINATION - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.DestinationMode
    Agent moves away from its destination (flee).
    FLOOD - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.graph.DangerZone.DangerType
    Flood — blocks neighboring edges over time.
    FLOOD - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.graph.Edge.BlockType
    Blocked by flood.
    FOLLOW - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.Behavior
    Agent tries to follow the nearest moving agent.
    fromDangerType(DangerZone.DangerType) - Static method in enum class evacuation.graph.DangerZone.TypeDanger
    Deprecated.
     

    G

    generateUniqueId(String) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Generates a unique node ID with the given prefix.
    genererIdUnique(String) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Deprecated.
    Use Graph.generateUniqueId(String)
    getAgents() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
     
    getAgentSel() - Method in class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer
    Deprecated.
    Use GraphRenderer.getSelectedAgent()
    getAgentsEnTransit() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.getAgentsInTransit()
    getAgentsInTransit() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
     
    getAgentsPassed() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getAgentsPassed() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
     
    getAgentsPassed() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
    Returns the total number of agents that have passed through this node.
    getAnimationSpeed() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Returns the animation speed for this agent, based on its psychological state and the current edge's speed modifier.
    getArrivalBehavior() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getBaseWeight() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
     
    getBehavior() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getBlockType() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
     
    getCapacite() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.getCapacity()
    getCapacite() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
    Deprecated.
    Use Node.getCapacity()
    getCapacity() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
     
    getCapacity() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Exit
    Returns the evacuation capacity of this exit.
    getCapacity() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
     
    getChemin() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.getPath()
    getClosestNode(Node, Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Returns the closest non-blocked node to the reference node, excluding the given node.
    getComportement() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.getBehavior()
    getCongestionMaxArete() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.getMaxEdgeCongestion()
    getDangerType() - Method in class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
     
    getDangerTypeStr() - Method in class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
     
    getDensiteMax() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.getMaxDensity()
    getDensiteParNoeud() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.getDensityPerNode()
    getDensityPerNode() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Returns agent density per node (index corresponds to graph.getNodes() order).
    getDensityTolerance() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getDepartureNode() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getDestination() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getDestination() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
     
    getDestinationMode() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getDisplayX() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getDisplayY() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getDistances() - Method in class evacuation.routing.DijkstraPathFinder
    Returns the distance map from the last computed path.
    getEdge(Node, Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Finds the edge between two nodes (in either direction for undirected edges).
    getEdgeProgress() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getEdges() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
     
    getEdgesDuNoeud(Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Deprecated.
    Use Graph.getEdgesOfNode(Node)
    getEdgesOfNode(Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Returns all edges connected to the given node (both source and destination).
    getEtatDeplacement() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.getMovementState()
    getEtatPsychologique() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.getPsychologicalState()
    getFacteurRalentissement() - Method in class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
    Deprecated.
    Use DangerZone.getSlowdownFactor()
    getGraph() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
     
    getId() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getId() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
     
    getLastPath() - Method in class evacuation.routing.DijkstraPathFinder
    Returns the last computed shortest path.
    getLastPath() - Method in interface evacuation.routing.PathFinder
    Returns the last computed shortest path.
    getMaxDensity() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Returns the maximum agent density across all nodes.
    getMaxEdgeCongestion() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Returns the maximum agent count on any edge.
    getMode() - Method in class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer
     
    getModeDestination() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.getDestinationMode()
    getMovementState() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getMovementStats() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Returns movement state counts as an array: [waiting, moving, arrived, blocked].
    getNeighbors(Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Returns the accessible neighbors of a node.
    getNiveauRisque() - Method in class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
    Deprecated.
    Use DangerZone.getRiskLevel()
    getNode(String) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Finds a node by its unique identifier.
    getNodes() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
     
    getNodesToBlock() - Method in class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
    Returns the set of nodes that will be blocked in the next phase 1.
    getNoeudCible() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.getTargetNode()
    getNoeudDepart() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.getDepartureNode()
    getNoeudLePlusProche(Node, Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Deprecated.
    Use Graph.getClosestNode(Node, Node)
    getPath() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getPlusCourt() - Method in interface evacuation.routing.PathFinder
    Deprecated.
    Use PathFinder.getLastPath()
    getPoids() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.getWeight()

    Deprecated.
    Use Graph.getWeight(Node, Node)
    getPoidsBase() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.getBaseWeight()
    getPosition() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getProgressArete() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.getEdgeProgress()
    getPsychologicalState() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getPsychologicalStats() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Returns psychological state counts as an array: [calm, panic, madness].
    getRawNeighbors(Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Returns all neighbors of a node, including via blocked edges (raw view).
    getRiskLevel() - Method in class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
     
    getSelectedAgent() - Method in class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer
     
    getSlowdownFactor() - Method in class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
    Returns the slowdown factor applied to agents near this danger zone.

    getSpeed() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    getSpeedModifier() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
     
    getStats() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
    Returns a formatted statistics string for this node.
    getStatsDeplacement() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.getMovementStats()
    getStatsPsychologiques() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.getPsychologicalStats()

    getTick() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
     
    getToleranceDensite() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.getDensityTolerance()
    getTypeBlocage() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.getBlockType()

    Deprecated.
    Use DangerZone.getDangerType()

    Deprecated.
    Use DangerZone.getDangerTypeStr()
    getVitesse() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.getSpeed()
    getVitesseAnimation() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.getAnimationSpeed()
    getVoisins(Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Deprecated.
    Use Graph.getNeighbors(Node)
    getVoisinsRaw(Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Deprecated.
    Use Graph.getRawNeighbors(Node)
    getWeight() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Returns the effective weight of this edge for pathfinding.
    getWeight(Node, Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Returns the effective weight of the edge between two nodes.
    getX() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
     
    getY() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
     
    Graph - Class in evacuation.graph
    Represents the evacuation graph containing nodes and edges.
    Graph() - Constructor for class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Constructs an empty Graph.
    GraphRenderer - Class in evacuation.ui
    Swing panel that renders the evacuation graph and its agents.
    GraphRenderer(SimulationEngine) - Constructor for class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer
    Constructs a GraphRenderer for the given simulation engine.
    GraphRenderer.Mode - Enum Class in evacuation.ui
    Interaction modes for the renderer.

    I

    induceMadness() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Induces madness in this agent (without modifying the initial state).
    inducePanic() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Induces panic in this agent (without modifying the initial state).
    induireFolie() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.induceMadness()
    induirePanique() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.inducePanic()
    initialiser() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.initialize()
    initialiser() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.initialize()
    initialize() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Initializes the agent for simulation, computing the initial path.
    initialize() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Initializes (or reinitializes) the simulation.
    INONDATION - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.graph.DangerZone.TypeDanger
    Deprecated.
     
    INONDATION - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.graph.Edge.TypeBlocage
    Deprecated.
     
    isAvailable() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
     
    isBlocked() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
    Returns whether this node is currently blocked.
    isBloque() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
    Deprecated.
    Use Node.isBlocked()
    isDirected() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
     
    isDisponible() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.isAvailable()
    isEnCours() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.isRunning()
    isEstOuverte() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Exit
    Deprecated.
    Use Exit.isOpen()
    isFinished() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Returns true if all agents have reached a terminal state (ARRIVED or BLOCKED).
    isMarkedForDeletion() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    isOpen() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Exit
    Returns whether this exit is currently open.
    isRunning() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
     
    isTooClose(double, double, double) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Checks whether any existing node is within the given radius of (x, y).

    L

    lancerSimulation() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.runSimulation()
    load(File) - Static method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Loads a simulation state from a file.

    M

    MADNESS - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.PsychologicalState
    Madness — moves randomly, very fast, stops at any exit.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class evacuation.Main
    Main entry point.
    Main - Class in evacuation
    Application entry point for the evacuation simulation.
    Main() - Constructor for class evacuation.Main
     
    MainFrame - Class in evacuation.ui
    The main application window for the evacuation simulation.
    MainFrame(SimulationEngine) - Constructor for class evacuation.ui.MainFrame
    Constructs the main application window.
    move() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Advances the agent's logical state by one simulation tick.
    MOVING - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.MovementState
    Agent is actively moving.

    N

    Node - Class in evacuation.graph
    Represents a node (vertex) in the evacuation graph.
    Node(String) - Constructor for class evacuation.graph.Node
    Constructs a Node at the origin (0, 0).
    Node(String, double, double) - Constructor for class evacuation.graph.Node
    Constructs a Node at the specified position.
    NONE - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.graph.Edge.BlockType
    No blockage.
    notifierChangementGraphe() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.notifyGraphChanged()
    notifyGraphChanged() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Triggers a path recalculation for all non-arrived, non-waiting agents.

    O

    onNodeRemoved(Node) - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Handles the removal of a node during an active simulation.
    onNoeudSupprime(Node) - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.onNodeRemoved(Node)
    open() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Exit
    Opens this exit, allowing agents to use it.
    ouvrir() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Exit
    Deprecated.
    Use Exit.open()

    P

    paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer
     
    PANIC - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.PsychologicalState
    Panic — moves faster, recalculates on congestion, becomes PRIORITY.
    PathFinder - Interface in evacuation.routing
    Interface for pathfinding algorithms on the evacuation graph.
    PERSONNE_DANGEREUSE - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.graph.DangerZone.TypeDanger
    Deprecated.
     
    PRIORITY - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.Behavior
    Agent has priority, does not yield.
    propagate(Graph) - Method in class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
    Propagates the danger zone effect by one step.
    propager(Graph) - Method in class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
    Deprecated.
    Use DangerZone.propagate(Graph)

    R

    rafraichir() - Method in class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer
    Requests a repaint.
    RANDOM_DESTINATION - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.ArrivalBehavior
    Agent picks a random new destination.
    RANDOM_WALK - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.DestinationMode
    Agent picks a random new destination each time it arrives.
    recalculatePath() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Recalculates the path to the destination.
    recalculer() - Method in interface evacuation.routing.PathFinder
    Deprecated.
    Use PathFinder.reset()
    recalculerChemin() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.recalculatePath()
    recordAgentPassage() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
    Records that an agent has passed through this node.
    recordTransit() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Records that an agent has fully transited this edge.
    reinitialiser() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.reset()
    reinitialiserPropagation() - Method in class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
    Deprecated.
    Use DangerZone.reset()
    removeAgent() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Removes an agent from the in-transit count.
    removeAgent(Agent) - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Removes an agent from the simulation.
    removeEdge(Edge) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Removes an edge from the graph.
    removeNode(Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Removes a node and all its connected edges from the graph.
    repartirAgentsSurSorties() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.distributeAgentsToExits()
    reset() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Resets this agent to its initial state, as if the simulation had not started.
    reset() - Method in class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
    Resets the propagation state to its initial condition.
    reset() - Method in class evacuation.routing.DijkstraPathFinder
    Invalidates cached computation, forcing recalculation on next call.
    reset() - Method in interface evacuation.routing.PathFinder
    Invalidates cached computation, forcing recalculation on next call.
    resetStats() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Resets the agentsPassed counter to zero.
    resetStats() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Resets statistics for all nodes and edges in the graph.
    resetStats() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
    Resets the agentsPassed counter to zero.
    resetStats() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Resets all node and edge statistics (agent passage counts).
    retirerAgent() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.removeAgent()
    retournerVersNoeudDepart() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.returnToDepartureNode()
    returnToDepartureNode() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Returns this agent toward its departure node (used when target node is deleted).
    runSimulation() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Runs the full simulation synchronously from initialization to completion.

    S

    sauvegarder(File) - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.save(File)
    save(File) - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Saves the simulation state to a file.

    Use Agent.setOtherAgents(List)
    setBehavior(Agent.Behavior) - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
     
    setCapacite(int) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge

    Use Edge.setCapacity(int)
    setCapacite(int) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
    Deprecated.
    Use Node.setCapacity(int)
    setCapacity(int) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
     
    setCapacity(int) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Exit
    Sets the evacuation capacity of this exit.

    setMode(GraphRenderer.Mode) - Method in class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer
    Sets the interaction mode and resets edge-building state.

    setOtherAgents(List) - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent

    Sets the psychological state and resets auto-panic tracking.

    Use Agent.setSpeed(int)
    setX(double) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
     
    setY(double) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
     
    signal() - Method in class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
    Signals this danger zone (prints an alert message).
    signaler() - Method in class evacuation.graph.DangerZone
    Deprecated.
    Use DangerZone.signal()
    SimulationEngine - Class in evacuation.simulation
    The core simulation engine that drives agent movement and danger zone propagation.
    SimulationEngine(Graph) - Constructor for class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Constructs a SimulationEngine for the given graph.
    STOP - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.ArrivalBehavior
    Agent stops upon arrival.
    stopAnimation() - Method in class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer
    Stops the animation timer.
    SUPPRESSION - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer.Mode
     
    SUPPRESSION_AGENT - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer.Mode
     
    SUPPRESSION_ARETE - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.ui.GraphRenderer.Mode
     
    supprimerAgent(Agent) - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.removeAgent(Agent)
    supprimerEdge(Edge) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Deprecated.
    Use Graph.removeEdge(Edge)
    supprimerNode(Node) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Deprecated.
    Use Graph.removeNode(Node)
    syncAffichageAvecNoeud() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.syncDisplayWithNode()
    syncDisplayWithNode() - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Synchronizes the display position with the current logical node position.

    T

    teleporterVers(Node) - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Deprecated.
    Use Agent.teleportTo(Node)
    teleportTo(Node) - Method in class evacuation.agent.Agent
    Teleports the agent to the specified node and recalculates its path.
    tick() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Advances the simulation by one tick.
    tick_deprecated() - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.tick()

    Deprecated.
     
    toDangerType() - Method in enum class evacuation.graph.DangerZone.TypeDanger

    toString() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
     
    TOWARD_DENSE - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.DestinationMode
    Agent moves toward the most crowded neighbor.
    tropProche(double, double, double) - Method in class evacuation.graph.Graph
    Deprecated.
    Use Graph.isTooClose(double, double, double)
    trouverSortieDisponible(Node) - Method in class evacuation.simulation.SimulationEngine
    Deprecated.
    Use SimulationEngine.findAvailableExit(Node)

    U

    unblock() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Edge
    Unblocks this edge, restoring it to full availability.
    unblock() - Method in class evacuation.graph.Node
    Unblocks this node, allowing agents to enter again.

    W

    WAITING - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.MovementState
    Agent is waiting, not yet initialized.

    Y

    YIELD - Enum constant in enum class evacuation.agent.Agent.Behavior
    Agent yields to others in congested nodes.
